## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, LLM analysis, and competitive positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [LLM analysis reveals opportunities for Exec in competitor comparisons, comprehensive guides, and how-to content](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Exec is mentioned frequently in non-branded sources (95.7%), indicating a need to control narrative](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [New content strategy focuses on AI role-play, sales coaching, and category creation](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Team to collaborate on competitive research and integrate findings into content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

## Topics

### LLM Analysis Insights

  - [Analysis based on a few days of Profound data](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Exec mentioned in 4.3% of citations, 95.7% from non-Exec sources](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Opportunities identified:](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
      - [Competitor comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
      - [Comprehensive guides as authoritative sources](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [How-to content gap](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Exec positioning: speed and flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Competitors' positioning: e.g., Second Nature - conversational AI discussions with reps](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Pricing comparisons lacking Exec's specifics](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Focus on three key areas:](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
    1.  [Competitor comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
    2.  Comprehensive guides for LLM citations
    3.  How-to content (expanding on existing efforts)
  - [Category creation emphasis: "AI role play and sales coaching"](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Integrate competitive research into content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Megan to provide list of \~20 how-to article ideas by next day](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Explore creation of LLM .txt file for better site crawling](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

### Competitive Research Progress

  - [Garett developing template with AI-driven insights](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Includes capabilities checklist and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Manual verification and input from Sean and Nick pending](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Estimated completion: next week](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### Technical Developments

  - [GrowthX building internal version of Profound/Scrunch](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Aim: Easier extraction of LLM search queries](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Exploring LLM .txt file implementation for Exec's CMS (Contentful)](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

### Content Calendar and Management

  - [Airtable used for content tracking](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Multiple views available (weekly post, grid view)](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Garett to create custom view for easier tracking](https://fathom.video/share/w1W2NgwMhTxQcZWLAoTDteKdMNygomm_?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
